untranslatable_reason: The signal requires EWO (Elliott Wave Oscillator), which is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. EWO is a custom oscillator not available as a standard indicator. Additionally, the signal requires multi-wave state tracking (Wave 3/4/5 identification and comparison of oscillator values across waves), dynamic relabeling logic, and 5-period high detection — all of which require stateful logic beyond the scope of a simple 3-field condition structure. The entry conditions reference 'assume beginning of Wave 3', 'save current EWO and price values', and conditional relabeling based on comparative wave analysis, which cannot be expressed as static indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: This signal is based on Elliott Wave theory with oscillator state management. To implement this, you would need: (1) EWO as a custom indicator, (2) state variables to track wave position and prior values, (3) conditional logic to detect 5-period highs and manage wave transitions. Consider using a custom strategy class instead of rule-based conditions.
